_comment: Department registry — production-domain grouping (who owns a work, what stage it's in). Orthogonal to arcs-v2.json (reader-facing narrative grouping) and blueprint.json categories (publish-lifecycle: system/production/demo/staging/experimental). A node with no department field belongs to whichever entry here has default:true; a node with no workType field belongs to that department's 'default' workType.
